utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You wanna go in the bedroom ? It is a little more comfortable .

utterances.text: Sure .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay . Oh wait ! Umm , did you send those contracts to Milan ?

utterances.speaker: Tag
utterances.text: If this is your idea of sexy talk ?

emotion_cause.span: 4_If this is your idea of sexy talk ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No seriously , you know the contracts I gave you , did you overnight them ?

utterances.speaker: Tag
utterances.text: What contracts ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay please tell me that this is just one of your jokes that you do that I do not get .

utterances.text: Like what ?

utterances.text: You know , like the thing when you put the phone in your pants ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Tag !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: I am serious !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: This is not funny !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Those contracts absolutely had to go out today !

utterances.speaker: Tag
utterances.text: Rach , I am sorry , but you did not give me any contracts !

emotion_cause.span: 14_you did not give me any contracts !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yes I did ! And I put a little Post ... It on it that said , " Must go out today , " and underlined today three times and , and then I put a little heart in the corner because I didn’t want to seem too bossy .

utterances.speaker: Tag
utterances.text: I am telling you , you never gave them to me .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: You know what Tag , if we went down to the office you would see those contracts sitting on your desk .

utterances.speaker: Tag
utterances.text: No , I would see you looking embarrassed because they are not on my desk !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Or maybe you would see me looking embarrassed because you are talking on the phone with your crotch !

utterances.speaker: Tag
utterances.text: You wanna go down to the office right now ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: No ! Come on its late , we are not gonna go down to the office .

utterances.speaker: Tag
utterances.text: Okay I understand . I would not want to be proved wrong either .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
